webhookSent: Webhook has been sent to the merchant
invoiceExpiredDesc: This invoice has expired. Please create a new one.
invoiceCancelledDesc: This invoice was cancelled by the administrator.
confirmationsTooltip: Network confirmations reduce the risk of chain reorganizations reversing your transaction.
blockLagTooltip: How far behind the chain tip we process blocks. A small lag improves stability and protects against short reorganizations.
themeHint: Got a full bright-theme flashbang to the face? Don't worry — I'm right here.
